# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.9

This release adds a visual grid picker for safe slot selection, replacing manual comma-separated text entry with an interactive 10×6 inventory grid.

## Highlights

- **Safe slot grid picker** – a new "选择" button appears next to the Safe slots field. Clicking it opens a 10×6 dialog showing all 60 inventory slots. Click any slot to toggle it as safe (blue = selected); confirm with "确认" to write the result back to the text field. Cancelling leaves the field unchanged.
- **Proper layout alignment** – the picker button is contained inside a fixed-size inline widget (same min/max width as other form fields) so the safe slot row aligns flush with the rows above and below it in the Helper settings panel.
- **Multilingual** – all dialog strings (title, hint, buttons) go through the `tr()` translation system and are available in 简体中文, English, and 繁體中文.
- **Button stays disabled** – the picker button follows the same enabled/disabled logic as the text field: it is only active when at least one helper that uses safe slots (Salvage, Upgrade, Convert, Abandon) is enabled.

## 中文摘要

- 助手设置中新增"安全格"可视化选择器：点击"选择"按钮，弹出 10×6 背包格子窗口，点击格子切换选中状态（蓝色 = 已选中），点击"确认"后将所选格子编号写回输入框。
- 选择按钮与上下表单行宽度对齐，不再突出。
- 新对话框支持三语言（简体中文 / English / 繁體中文）。
- 选择按钮与文本框同步启用/禁用，行为与原逻辑一致。
